title: Class with parameters causes buffer overflow during tracing

features.name: parameterized class with tracing via dumpvars
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class definition used with $dumpvars tracing enabled

features.name: parameterized class typedef instantiation
features.description: Code should include a typedef of a parameterized class with a specific parameter value, instantiated as a variable

features.name: trace dumpvars on class instance
features.description: Code should include $dumpvars called with a class instance variable to enable waveform tracing
